title: backend: kubeconfig: Stop treating empty path and missing file as load errors
author: govindup63

findings.description: Silently suppressing ErrNotExist means a mistyped --kubeconfig path will produce no error and no contexts. Consider adding a slog.Debug/Info at the call sites in createHeadlampHandler to preserve debuggability without reinstating ERROR spam. PR description acknowledges this tradeoff but leaves it open.
errors.Is(err, fs.ErrNotExist) correctly distinguishes missing-file from other OS errors (permissions, malformed path), so non-trivial errors still propagate.
Upgrades %v to %w error wrapping, enabling errors.Is/errors.As for callers in the future.
Existing invalid_file subtests correctly renamed to missing_file with assertions flipped to NoError, accurately describing what they exercise.
New empty_path subtests directly cover the in-cluster scenario; TestLoadAndStoreKubeConfigs/empty_path also asserts the store is empty after the no-op call.
